summary: Convergence-bar scenario: operator supplies an inline CSV and asks for an LLM classification with structured output. The historical failure mode this catches is the model declaring a fixed CSV schema that omits one or more observed columns, which combined with on_validation_failure=discard silently drops every row. GREEN requires the source schema to cover the observed columns (observed/flexible mode, or fixed mode listing all columns), an LLM transform in the node chain, and a JSON/JSONL output. The repair loop (max=2) must converge without bouncing back to the user.
opening_prompt:
Please classify these customer support tickets by urgency (high/medium/low) using an LLM and write the results as JSONL. Each row should keep all original fields plus a new urgency field. Use OpenRouter with anthropic/claude-3.5-sonnet. Tickets (CSV):
ticket_id,customer_name,subject,body,received_at
T-001,Alice Wong,Refund timeline,My order #4421 has not arrived in 3 weeks and I want to cancel.,2026-05-06T09:14:00Z
T-002,Bob Singh,Discount enquiry,Can I get a 5% loyalty code for my next order?,2026-05-06T09:18:00Z
T-003,Carla Diaz,System down,Login page returns 500 errors on Firefox and Safari for the last 2 hours.,2026-05-06T09:22:00Z
T-004,Dan O'Brien,Address change,Please update shipping address for upcoming delivery.,2026-05-06T09:25:00Z
T-005,Eve Kim,Severe outage,Production reporting pipeline crashed at 09:20 UTC; payroll run is at risk.,2026-05-06T09:31:00Z

red_criteria.passivity_phrases_note: Anti-tail-offer rule applies. The convergence bar additionally forbids the model asking the user technical clarification questions; the runtime repair loop should suppress those before they reach the user, and any that escape are caught by the passivity phrase set.
build_failure_sentinels: i cannot mark this pipeline complete
red_criteria.build_failure_note: Server-injected from service.py:_build_runtime_preflight_message() on completion-claim with failed preflight.

green_criteria.must_have_node_chain_in_order_note: An LLM transform must be in the chain. Order is trivially the only constraint.
green_criteria.must_include_observed_columns_note: These five columns are explicitly present in the prompt's CSV. A fixed schema that omits any of them combined with on_validation_failure=discard would drop every row. observed and flexible modes pass; fixed mode must list all five.
green_criteria.max_repair_turns_note: First-pass success is target; one internal repair turn is allowed; never a user clarification turn. Field is populated by service.py once the repair loop ships in Step 4 of the convergence program.
